description: Returning customer with prior resolved tickets in cross-ticket memory asks a routine order-status question. The order is pre-loaded, so the agent should answer directly from context without re-fetching or escalating. Past-ticket memory must not derail the standard quick-reply path.

pastTickets.aiSummary: Asked whether we ship to Canada; confirmed we do and quoted standard rates.
Reported a delayed order #5012; tracking showed it in transit and it arrived two days later.

messages.contentText: Hi again - can you tell me where order #5050 is?

instruction: Reply to the customer about their order.
